ddls:
CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "analysis_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the analysis */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the analysis */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the analysis */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the analysis */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., retrospective, prospective) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covariates" (
  "covariate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each covariate */,
  "covariate_name" TEXT /* Name of the covariate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the covariate */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the covariate (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the covariate (if applicable) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the covariate (if applicable) */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the covariate (if applicable) */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value for the covariate */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the covariate (e.g., demographic, clinical) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the covariate (e.g., age, sex) */,
  "allowed_values" TEXT /* Allowed values for the covariate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("covariate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_covariates" (
  "analysis_covariate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis-covariate pair */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis */,
  "covariate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the covariate */,
  "included" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the covariate is included in the analysis */,
  "covariate_value" REAL /* Value of the covariate in the context of the analysis */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the covariate in the analysis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the covariate in the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_covariate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_covariates_covariate_id FOREIGN KEY ("covariate_id") REFERENCES covariates ("covariate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_covariates_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concepts" (
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concept */,
  "concept_name" TEXT /* Name of the concept */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the concept */,
  "concept_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the concept */,
  "parent_concept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent concept (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covariate_concepts" (
  "covariate_concept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each covariate-concept pair */,
  "covariate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the covariate */,
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the concept */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the covariate and concept */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("covariate_concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covariate_concepts_covariate_id FOREIGN KEY ("covariate_id") REFERENCES covariates ("covariate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covariate_concepts_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* User's institution or organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* User's department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis accessed */,
  "covariate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the covariate accessed (if applicable) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "client_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the client accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_covariate_id FOREIGN KEY ("covariate_id") REFERENCES covariates ("covariate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the action occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action (e.g., old and new values) */,
  "old_values" TEXT /* Old values of the modified record */,
  "new_values" TEXT /* New values of the modified record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
